summary: Iteration 352 - Netflix-style Dashboard with R2 Media Proxy Testing Complete. All major features verified working: Hero section with REAL thumbnail background (bunny/cat illustrations), FEATURED badge, hook text, 5 carousel dots, Continue Story + Create Your Own CTAs. Story cards show REAL AI-generated thumbnails via R2 proxy (cats, rabbits, knights, robots, foxes, stars). All horizontal scroll rows working: Continue Watching (8+ cards), Trending Now (12 cards with See All), Just Dropped. Scroll hook 'You won't believe what happens next...' visible. Quick Tools at bottom. R2 media proxy endpoint returns 200 with image/jpeg. Story-feed API returns proxy URLs. Credits display shows loading skeleton (not literal dots). 17/17 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header set to 'no-store, no-cache' by middleware instead of 'max-age=86400' - images still load correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js Netflix-style layout is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
R2 media proxy at /api/media/r2/{key} works correctly - returns 200 with image/jpeg content
Story-feed API correctly converts R2 URLs to proxy paths (/api/media/r2/...)
mediaUrl() helper in Dashboard.js correctly prepends REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to proxy paths
SafeImage component handles image loading with skeleton and retry logic
HeroBg component shows real thumbnail with gradient fallback
StoryCard component has 4:5 aspect ratio with hover effects and badges
ScrollRow component implements horizontal scroll with arrow navigation
ScrollHook component shows gradient text with animated dots
Credits display shows loading skeleton when null (iteration_351 fix verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Netflix-style Dashboard with R2 media proxy fully verified. All thumbnails load via /api/media/r2/{key} proxy endpoint. Story-feed API returns proxy URLs. Dashboard shows real AI-generated thumbnails (cats, rabbits, knights, robots, foxes, stars). Hero carousel with 5 dots works. All scroll rows render correctly. Credits display fixed (shows skeleton not dots).

Feature_1_Dashboard_Loads.details: Dashboard loads after login without errors

Feature_2_Hero_Real_Thumbnail.details: Hero section shows REAL thumbnail image background (bunny/cat illustrations via R2 proxy)

Feature_3_Hero_Title_Hook_Badge.details: Hero has title 'Clover and the Golden Key', hook text, FEATURED badge, WATERCOLOR style badge

Feature_4_Hero_CTAs.details: Continue Story and Create Your Own buttons visible and functional

Feature_6_Continue_Watching_Row.details: Continue Watching horizontal scroll row renders with 8+ story cards showing REAL thumbnails

Feature_7_Story_Cards_4_5_Ratio.details: Story cards have 4:5 aspect ratio with visible thumbnails, titles, hook text, badges (TRENDING/HOT/NEW), Continue Story CTA

Feature_8_Trending_Now_Row.details: Trending Now horizontal scroll row renders with larger cards and See All link

Feature_9_Scroll_Hook.details: Scroll hook 'You won't believe what happens next...' renders between sections with animated dots

Feature_10_Just_Dropped_Section.details: Just Dropped section renders with story cards

Feature_11_Quick_Tools.details: Quick Tools row at bottom shows minimal tool chips (Story Video, Reels, Comic Book, Bedtime Story, Caption AI)

Feature_12_R2_Media_Proxy.details: R2 media proxy endpoint /api/media/r2/{key} returns 200 with image/jpeg data (92-114KB)

Feature_13_Story_Feed_Proxy_URLs.details: Story feed API /api/engagement/story-feed returns proxy URLs (starting with /api/media/r2/)

Feature_14_No_Literal_Dots.details: Credits display shows loading skeleton (not literal '...' dots) when credits is null

Feature_15_Story_Card_Navigation.details: Clicking a story card navigates to story-video-studio

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. R2 storage accessed via boto3 get_object through backend proxy.
